text:
Lopecode-dev is claude-code configuration for working with lopecode documents.
It can pair program on a live notebook, write lopecode documents, push them to <http://Observbalehq.com|Observbalehq.com> and maintain my content repositories.
Its squished a ton of bugs in the last 4 days its been working. Just to see how hard it could go I asked for an in-browser <https://tomlarkworthy.github.io/lopebooks/notebooks/@tomlarkworthy_compile-zig.html#view=R100(S63(@tomlarkworthy/compile-zig),S37(@tomlarkworthy/fileattachments))|zig compiler> which is delivered in a 7Mb HTML file.

<https://github.com/tomlarkworthy/lopecode-dev>
